news.t: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs

overview.description: The Invesco California AMT-Free Municipal Bond ETF (PWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of insured investment-grade, tax-exempt debt issued by California or any US territory with at least 15 years remaining to maturity. PWZ was launched on Oct 11, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE BofA California Long-Term Core Plus Muni

data.title: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs
data.text: This week J.P. Morgan Asset Management launched two actively managed municipal bond ETFs focused on California and New York debt, offering investors a way to earn tax-free income inside a more flexibl...
